use_cases: Displaying and managing a searchable list of professional contacts with connection strength indicators
Showing detailed contact information in an animated modal overlay on click
Filtering contacts by connection strength and sorting by Twitter followers
Providing dark/light theme support for contacts management interfaces
Enabling contact selection callbacks for CRM or networking applications
ai_summary: A sophisticated contacts table component with modal detail view, featuring connection strength visualization, sorting capabilities, and smooth Framer Motion animations. Supports dark/light theme modes and includes export functionality. Ideal for SaaS platforms, CRM systems, or networking applications requiring contact management with relationship tracking.
